name: Little Feta Cheesecakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, whisk together egg whites and sugar until soft peaks form.
3. Add cream of tartar, flour, lemon zest, juice, and salt; mix until well combined.
4. Fold in crumbled feta cheese until evenly distributed.
5. Divide batter among 6 ramekins or mini muffin tins.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until set and lightly browned on top.
7. Allow to cool completely before serving.
